name: Alcoa Park
description: Alcoa Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Massena, NY. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: MAXCY Fieldhouse
description: MAXCY Fieldhouse is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Potsdam, NY. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Priest Field
description: Come play pickleball at Priest Field in Canton, NY! There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Sandstone Courts
description: Sandstone Courts is a place to play pickleball in Potsdam, NY. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms.

name: SUNY Canton,  Dana Hall
description: SUNY Canton, Dana Hall is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Canton, NY. There are 3 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Village Of Massena Arena
description: Come play pickleball at Village Of Massena Arena in Massena, NY! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Wanakena Backcountry Pickleball
description: Wanakena Backcountry Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wanakena, NY. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Winthrop Playground
description: Winthrop Playground is a place to play pickleball in Winthrop, NY. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.
